info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Qlik Sense ODAG Service API
Qlik Sense Enterprise Get ODAG service information

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Retrieves basic information about the ODAG service including its version and stability index.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List navigation links

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of ODAG navigation links and their properties. Each link connects a selection app to a template app for on-demand app generation.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Create navigation link

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Creates a new navigation link that enables ODAG navigation from a designated selection app to a template app. Links created via the API do not appear in the list of available navigation links in the UI.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get navigation link by ID

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: linkId
params.description: Unique identifier of the navigation link

items.docs: Retrieves a single ODAG navigation link by its unique identifier.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Update navigation link

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: linkId
params.description: Unique identifier of the navigation link

items.docs: Updates an existing ODAG navigation link configuration.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Delete navigation link

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: linkId
params.description: Unique identifier of the navigation link

items.docs: Deletes an ODAG navigation link. Generated apps associated with the link are not affected.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List requests for a navigation link

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: linkId
params.description: Unique identifier of the navigation link

items.docs: Returns a list of ODAG requests for a specific link, optionally matching a set of conditions defined by additional parameters.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Submit app generation request

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: linkId
params.description: Unique identifier of the navigation link

items.docs: Submits a new app generation request to the ODAG service. The request is queued after validating the user selection state against the navigation link property settings and rules.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise List all ODAG requests

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

items.docs: Returns a list of ODAG request objects matching the combination of search criteria provided as query parameters.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Get ODAG request by ID

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: requestId
params.description: Unique identifier of the ODAG request

items.docs: Retrieves a single ODAG request by its unique identifier, including the current status and generated app information.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Update ODAG request

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: requestId
params.description: Unique identifier of the ODAG request

items.docs: Updates an existing ODAG request, such as changing its status or metadata.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Remove generated app from request

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: requestId
params.description: Unique identifier of the ODAG request

items.docs: Removes the generated app associated with an ODAG request. The app is deleted from the repository.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Reload generated app

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: requestId
params.description: Unique identifier of the ODAG request

items.docs: Triggers a reload of the generated app associated with an ODAG request, refreshing its data from the template and selection state.

info.name: Qlik Sense Enterprise Rename generated app

params.name: Xrfkey
params.description: Cross-site request forgery prevention key matching the X-Qlik-Xrfkey header.

params.name: requestId
params.description: Unique identifier of the ODAG request

items.docs: Renames the generated app associated with an ODAG request.
